creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
I confirm this problem on 9.0-RELEASE amd64 

Motherboard: ASUS P8H67-M LGA1155 H67
HDD: protocol              ATA/ATAPI-7 SATA 2.x
device model          SAMSUNG HD103SI
firmware revision     1AG01118
ZFS

I can give more details and info if requested, ready to test patches
etc.

I don't agree this problem is low priority. It is actually very
annoying and prevents any normal use of the system.


-- 
Victor Sudakov,  VAS4-RIPE, VAS47-RIPN
